name: chr2_2q31_HOXD_cluster
description: 2q31.1 HOXD homeobox gene cluster (HOXD1, HOXD3, HOXD4, HOXD8-13). One of the four canonical mammalian HOX clusters arising from genome-wide duplications; paralogs to HOXA (chr7), HOXB (chr17), HOXC (chr12). Microdeletions cause synpolydactyly and limb malformations.

architecture.internal_structure: Compact 100 kb HOXD cluster with 9 active HOX genes; cross-cluster paralog signal to HOXA/B/C; flanking TAD-defining CTCF arrays and EVX2.
